sample_id.description: Sample identifier matching ^[A-Za-z0-9_-]+$; used to prefix every output file (Req 2.1, 7.3).

hifi_reads_bam.description: S3 URI to the PacBio HiFi reads in BAM format (aligned or unaligned per hifi_reads_aligned).

hifi_reads_bai.description: Optional S3 URI to the .bai index. Required when hifi_reads_aligned=true (Req 2.3); unused when false.

hifi_reads_aligned.description: When true, skip Pbmm2_Align and feed hifi_reads_bam straight to the read-based callers (Req 2.3, 17.9).

reference_fasta.description: S3 URI to the reference FASTA (GRCh38 no-alt analysis set by default).

reference_fai.description: S3 URI to the reference FASTA .fai index.

output_prefix.description: S3 URI ending in '/' under which all output files are written (Req 7.1, 7.4).

run_hifiasm_pav.description: Enable the Hifiasm + PAV + PAV2SVs assembly-based caller chain (Req 2.6, 3.1).

shard_by_chromosome.description: Fan Sniffles2 and PBSV out per chromosome (one task per GRCh38 autosome + chrX/chrY). Hifiasm and PAV are whole-genome (Design D7, Req 17.8).

run_storage_type.description: HealthOmics run-storage mode. DYNAMIC auto-scales run storage and bills per GB-hour; STATIC allocates a fixed size for the full run (Design D6, Req 17.2).

enable_run_cache.description: Use the HealthOmics call-cache when available in your deployment region (Design D16, Req 17.12).

harmoniser_filter_override_json.description: Optional S3 URI to a JSON file of filter threshold overrides passed verbatim to the harmoniser (Req 6.6).

pbmm2_cpu.description: Override Pbmm2_Align vCPU count. Default 16 matches whole-genome HiFi alignment per AoU Phase 1 (D12).

pbmm2_memory_gb.description: Override Pbmm2_Align memory in GB. Default 64 (D12).

pbmm2_disk_gb.description: Override Pbmm2_Align local SSD in GB. Default 500 (D12).

hifiasm_cpu.description: Override Hifiasm_Assemble vCPU count. Default 48 for whole-genome 30x HiFi (Req 11.2, D12).

hifiasm_memory_gb.description: Override Hifiasm_Assemble memory in GB. Default 256 — required for whole-genome assembly (D13).

hifiasm_disk_gb.description: Override Hifiasm_Assemble local SSD in GB. Default 1500 (D12).

hifiasm_bloom_filter_bits.description: Hifiasm bloom filter size exponent. Use 37 (default) for whole-genome (~16 GB bloom table, faster). Use 0 for chr20/small inputs (disables bloom filter, lower memory). See hifiasm docs for details.

pav_cpu.description: Override PAV_Run vCPU count. Default 32; PAV parallelises per-contig inside the task via Snakemake (Design D14).

pav_memory_gb.description: Override PAV_Run memory in GB. Default 128 (D12).

pav_disk_gb.description: Override PAV_Run local SSD in GB. Default 1000 (D12).

pav2svs_cpu.description: Override PAV2SVs vCPU count. Default 2 (small filter task).

pav2svs_memory_gb.description: Override PAV2SVs memory in GB. Default 8.

pav2svs_disk_gb.description: Override PAV2SVs local SSD in GB. Default 50.

sniffles2_cpu.description: Override per-shard Sniffles2_Task vCPU count. Default 8 (D12).

sniffles2_memory_gb.description: Override per-shard Sniffles2_Task memory in GB. Default 32 (D12).

sniffles2_disk_gb.description: Override per-shard Sniffles2_Task local SSD in GB. Default 200 (D12).

sniffles2_merge_memory_gb.description: Override Sniffles2_Merge_Task memory in GB. Default 8.

sniffles2_merge_disk_gb.description: Override Sniffles2_Merge_Task local SSD in GB. Default 100.

pbsv_discover_cpu.description: Override per-shard PBSV_Discover_Task vCPU count. Default 4 (D12).

pbsv_discover_memory_gb.description: Override per-shard PBSV_Discover_Task memory in GB. Default 16 (D12).

pbsv_discover_disk_gb.description: Override per-shard PBSV_Discover_Task local SSD in GB. Default 200 (D12).

pbsv_merge_svsig_memory_gb.description: Override PBSV_Merge_Svsig_Task memory in GB. Default 8.

pbsv_merge_svsig_disk_gb.description: Override PBSV_Merge_Svsig_Task local SSD in GB. Default 100.

pbsv_call_memory_gb.description: Override PBSV_Call_Task memory in GB. Default 64 (D12).

pbsv_call_disk_gb.description: Override PBSV_Call_Task local SSD in GB. Default 200 (D12).

harmoniser_memory_gb.description: Override Harmoniser memory in GB. Default 32 (D12).

harmoniser_disk_gb.description: Override Harmoniser local SSD in GB. Default 200 (D12).

input_manifest_json.description: S3 URI to the serialised Input_Manifest JSON, written by submit-run.py and echoed into run_metadata.json (Req 7.2, 16.2).

pipeline_version.description: Semantic pipeline version string, must match VERSION file and meta.version in main.wdl (Property 14, Req 16.3).

git_commit.description: Git commit SHA of the pipeline repository at the time this workflow revision was deployed (Req 12.3, 16.2).

healthomics_run_id.description: HealthOmics run identifier, supplied by submit-run.py after StartRun returns (Req 12.2).

workflow_id.description: HealthOmics workflow identifier (wfl-...). Populated by submit-run.py (Req 12.2).

workflow_name.description: Logical workflow name recorded in run_metadata.json.

workflow_version.description: Workflow version string recorded in run_metadata.json. Matches pipeline_version in the default case.

run_start_time.description: ISO-8601 UTC start timestamp of the HealthOmics run, supplied by submit-run.py (Req 12.2).

run_end_time.description: ISO-8601 UTC end timestamp of the HealthOmics run, supplied by submit-run.py (Req 12.2).

run_status.description: Final status string for the HealthOmics run (e.g. COMPLETED, FAILED). Written verbatim into run_metadata.json (Req 12.2).
